archimate:DataObject.name: Transaction metadata
archimate:DataObject.documentation:
Definition: Transaction Metadata refers to structured information that captures details and contextual information about a specific transaction. It includes attributes such as transaction ID, date and time, parties involved, transaction type, transaction status, and any additional metadata relevant to the transaction. Transaction Metadata provides a comprehensive view of the transaction, enabling data analysis, auditing, tracking, and reporting.
Source: ISO
LOST view: SV-Business Agnostic Metadata
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/TransactionMetadataDataObject
ABB name: egovera:TransactionMetadataDataObject
EIRA concept: eira:ArchitectureBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2023-11-20
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/TransactionMetadataDataObject
Interoperability Layer: Semantic
Specialises: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/DataSetDataObject

properties.value: Transaction Metadata refers to structured information that captures details and contextual information about a specific transaction. It includes attributes such as transaction ID, date and time, parties involved, transaction type, transaction status, and any additional metadata relevant to the transaction. Transaction Metadata provides a comprehensive view of the transaction, enabling data analysis, auditing, tracking, and reporting.
